# Shaded In The Sun

> Custom window treatments — blinds, shades, and motorized options — for Oklahoma City, Edmond, and the OKC metro. Authorized Graber® and Norman® dealer. Free in-home consultations by owners Brent and Edna Buxton.

## Key Facts
- Service area: Oklahoma City, Edmond, Nichols Hills, Yukon, The Village, Bethany, Moore, Piedmont, Warr Acres, Mustang, and surrounding metro
- Free in-home consultation, 60–90 minutes, evenings and weekends available
- Custom blinds from $200/window; cellular shades from $125/shade; roller shades from $300/window; Roman shades from $550/window; motorization typically $200–$400/shade (product only, installation separate)
- Motorization integrates with Amazon Alexa, Google Assistant, and Apple Siri
- Warranty: 1–5 years by product (manufacturer)
- Phone: 405-259-5599 · Hours: Mon–Sat 8am–6pm

- [Blackout Shades](/blackout-shades-oklahoma-city.html): Custom blackout shades for Oklahoma City & Edmond that truly block all light — perfect for nurseries, shift workers, and home theaters.
- [Faux Wood Blinds](/faux-wood-blinds-oklahoma-city.html): Custom faux wood blinds for Oklahoma City & Edmond — moisture-resistant, kid-safe cordless lift.
- [Sliding Panels](/sliding-panels-oklahoma-city.html): Custom sliding panel track systems for Oklahoma City & Edmond patio doors and wide windows.
- [Patio Shades](/patio-shades-nichols-hills.html): Custom patio shades for Nichols Hills & Oklahoma City homes — block 99% of UV rays for patios, pergolas, and pool areas year-round.
- [Motorized Window Treatments](/motorized-window-treatments-for-OKC.html): Motorized blinds & shades for Oklahoma City & Edmond homes. Voice control, scheduling, and smart home integration, expertly installed.
- [Types of Window Blinds](/Types-of-window-blinds.html): Custom wood, faux wood, aluminum & vinyl blinds for Oklahoma City & Edmond homes.
- [Graber®](/graber.html): Custom Graber® window treatments for Oklahoma City & Edmond. Expert measurement, professional installation & free in-home consultation included.
- [Norman®](/norman.html): Explore Norman® custom window shades in OKC & Edmond. Roller, honeycomb, SmartDrape® & more.

- [Norman SmartDrape](/norman-smartdrape-oklahoma-city.html): Norman® SmartDrape drapery alternative for OKC & Edmond homes. Motorized elegance with smart automation.
